title: Creeper Fireworks
description: A Datapack for transform creeper explosions to firework explosions
body:
# Exploding Arrows Datapack


This datapack will add new recipe, Tnt Arrow. When you shoot it, it will explode where you hit (Block or Entity).


# Installation:
1. Move Datapack file to your world's datapack folder
2. Join your world (if you didnt yet)
3. Check datapack with using '/datapack list' command.
4. If datapack is activated you will find datapack on activated list, if not; use '/datapack enable <filename>' commad for activate
5. Enjoy your game :)



# Uninstallation:
1. Use '/datapack disable <filename>' command for disable datapack
2. Check datapack with using '/datapack list' command
3. If it is succesfully deactivated it won't listed under activated datapacks


# Limitations:
1. If you hit enemy and it dies by arrow it won't explode.
2. Some mobs won't explodes like Wither, Dragon etc. (Which can't take effects)

## Support me

If you want to support me don't forget to visit [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/MrLeon07)
Or Do not you want to join my [Discord](https://www.discord.gg/vSNKYcBmYy) server?
